answers: Tea types: black (strong), green (light, healthy), oolong (between black and green), white (delicate), herbal (caffeine-free).
Tea benefits: antioxidants, improved heart health, better focus (L-theanine), hydration, and calming ritual.
Perfect cup: use fresh water, proper temperature (black: boiling, green: 170°F), steep right time (3-5 min), don't over-steep.
Cha er upokarita: antioxidant bhora, heart er jonno valo, focus baray, stress komay. Green tea shobcheye healthy.
